recommended_actions_24h: Monitor Apache HTTP/2 logs for suspicious activity
recommended_actions_7d: Conduct a thorough vulnerability scan of all web-facing applications
Isolate affected systems from the internet until patch is applied
title: Apache HTTP/2 RCE
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-23918 is a critical remote code execution vulnerability in Apache HTTP/2, which can be exploited for denial-of-service and potential remote code execution. A patch is available for this vulnerability. Why now: Public exploit code is available (confidence: 0.90)

enrichment.lede: Critical Apache HTTP/2 Flaw (CVE-2026-23918) Enables DoS and Potential RCE.

recommended_actions_7d: Apply patch or workaround when available

title: Weaver E-cology RCE
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-22679 is a remote code execution vulnerability in Weaver E-cology, which is being actively exploited in the wild via the Debug API. No patch is currently available for this vulnerability. Why now: Actively exploited in the wild (confidence: 0.90)

enrichment.lede: Weaver E-cology RCE Flaw CVE-2026-22679 Actively Exploited via Debug API.

title: Nginx UI RCE
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-42220 is a remote code execution vulnerability in Nginx UI, with no available patch or workaround. This vulnerability is not yet exploited in the wild, but its presence in a web-facing application makes it a high-risk issue. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)

primary.title: Nginx UI is a web user interface for the Nginx web server

enrichment.lede: Critical Remote Code Execution Vulnerability Patched in Android.
